Letters of rumor reached caravans along the coast, then towns inland, then the elders around the fire. Mara chose honesty, returning to the first seller and confessing, offering restitution. The ledger glowed in the lamps, and a new habit formed: people weighed words by memory. Reputation became a durable, timeless pattern.
